THANK YOU GUYS FOR 18K!!!

Wait, when did we hit 17k

Whatever, again ty guys sm! I don't know what's wrong with my smut game. Am I tired?? Is there some other issue here??? I just haven't been able to write a proper special in so long 😭

This is quite suggestive though so 😜

Someone pray for me to be back on my smut game.

moving on,

What are things y'all find annoying about your fellow humans? I have so many people icks 😭 Most of them stem from what people did in HS.

My number one pet peeve has gotta be people who are male/relationship centered, I cannot tell you how much I was put through it in high school 😟

I get that at that age it's kinda "normal" to be so focused on the opposite sex but I could not do it. Almost every single one of my friends made their lives so male centered I couldn't even be in the same room, now I don't talk to them cause I'm FREEEE 😜

One situation I think every woman has been in at least once is your friend getting into a relationship and suddenly disappearing from your life but then suddenly expecting to make a reappearance when they got relationship problems or break up 🙄

I never took one of those girls back cause I stand on business but you gotta have a whole lotta AUDACITY to play like that...

Genuine question, y'all do realize you NEED more than one person in your life to lean on right?? If you only have one person for any kind of support what are you going to do if you fall out/they leave/move away/etc 😭

It was always so annoying to be dealing with those kind of girls and I'm glad I didn't entertain that kind of behavior. ALSO, I always just thought girls like that were annoying (severely annoying) but then I find tiktoks of other girls talking about their experiences with girls who are male/relationship crazy AND THESE GIRLS HAVE LITERALLY LEFT THEM IN DANGEROUS SITUATIONS FOR MEN??? There was this one story time of this girl who left her friend in a FOREIGN COUNTRY for some guy 😟

I'm so happy I never entertained people like that cause oh my GOD, how pathetic do you gotta be to act like that 💀 I never understood people who "can't stay single" an important skill for any functioning adult is how to be alone and independent, like are you a child...? 😭 It's just pitiful

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
